title: PRBarReviewOutput
description: Structured output for one AI PR review (or one subreview in a monorepo split). Claude validates this server-side via --json-schema, so a malformed shape becomes is_error=true rather than a silent bad parse.

verdict.description: approve = would press the merge button. comment = non-blocking notes. request_changes = blockers only. abstain = diff too small or opaque to judge.

confidence.description: Subjective confidence in the verdict. 1.0 = sure. Drives auto-approve gating.

summary.description: 3-6 terse sentences explaining the verdict. Markdown allowed.

annotations.description: Per-line review notes anchored to specific spans. Empty array is fine.

path.description: File path relative to the subreview root (e.g. 'audit/log.go' when reviewing 'kernel-billing').

body.description: The actual review comment. Markdown allowed.
